caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, spiked wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and glasses. In front of him is a black microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, the wall is covered in numerous framed photographs and some clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen graphics include a circular logo with the text "PODCAST" and a red banner that reads "GOSS TALK JOY" with smaller text below it stating "LOCK IN AND JOIN THE CONVERSATION". Across the sequence, the man transitions from looking forward with a neutral expression to speaking with his mouth open, before eventually tilting his head downward and closing his eyes. The camera remains stationary, keeping the man centered in the frame throughout the clip.
